backlog_import_rows.title: Make semantic contract overlay exhaustive and gated
Keep reality and coverage artifacts freshly regenerated
Recover live br backlog from reality-check gaps
Expand fixture coverage beyond single-digit symbol coverage
Separate L0 interpose evidence from L1 standalone replacement evidence
Broaden hard-parts fixtures for resolver, NSS, locale, iconv, loader, stdio, and pthread
Fix or quarantine repo-wide fmt/clippy/test drift
Add performance baselines for ported hot paths before optimizing

import_mapping_contract.acceptance_policy: A target bead must expose acceptance_criteria or an inline Acceptance: block in its description.
import_mapping_contract.dependency_policy: Feature-ledger gap follow-up beads must depend on bd-bp8fl.3 and bd-bp8fl.3.1 so grouping remains the import prerequisite.
import_mapping_contract.row_policy: Every backlog work_item and every unresolved ledger gap maps to at least one live bd-bp8fl bead.
import_mapping_contract.source_of_truth: JSONL-visible br beads plus deterministic conformance artifacts

purpose: Define and verify the live-bead import mapping for the reality-check bridge backlog and feature parity gap ledger.
